caption: A massive crowd of yellow-skinned characters stands before a towering wall of orange and yellow flames. The people are dressed in a variety of casual and formal attire, including suits, dresses, and work uniforms. Many of the characters have their arms raised in the air or are gesturing toward the fire. In the foreground, several figures are clearly visible, including a man in a blue suit and a woman in a red dress. As the sequence progresses, the characters shift their positions slightly, with some moving their arms and others adjusting their stance, while the wall of fire continues to blaze intensely behind them. The ground they stand on is a dark, flat surface. There are no visible objects, equipment, logos, or on-screen text throughout the scene.
